subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the mighty cord! Know thou that the clouds of grace have risen in the heaven of the Cause and have poured forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بالحبل المتین اعلم بان غمام الفضل قد ارتفع فی سماء الامر و فاض
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
